zh.siteSubtitle: 古兰经与圣训中的末日征兆
zh.homeIntro1: 伊斯兰末世论（al-Qiyamah，意为「复活」）是伊斯兰教信仰的核心组成部分，记载于古兰经与圣训（先知穆罕默德的言行录）之中。它描述了世界末日（末日审判，Yawm al-Qiyamah）之前将出现的一系列征兆，以及审判日本身的景象。
zh.homeIntro2: 末日征兆分为两类：小征兆（ashrat al-sa'ah al-sughra）描述了末日到来前社会道德、自然环境和人类行为的逐渐恶化；大征兆（al-ashrat al-kubra）则是末日即将来临前出现的超自然大事件，包括达贾勒（伪基督）的出现、马赫迪的降临、尔萨（耶稣）的重返、歌革与玛各的释放等。
zh.homeIntro3: 这些预言来自多部权威圣训集，包括布哈里圣训、穆斯林圣训、艾布·达吾德圣训等，跨越1400余年仍被全球近20亿穆斯林所信奉。本站整理了其中最具代表性的末世预言条目，并对可验证的小征兆进行了现实评估。
zh.coreQuote: 「末日不会来临，直到出现十个征兆：东方的烟雾、西方的烟雾、阿拉伯半岛的烟雾、达贾勒、地兽、歌革与玛各、太阳从西方升起、也门的一场大火驱赶人们走向集合之地。」——穆斯林圣训集
keyPointsList: 小征兆 —— 社会道德衰败、知识消逝、谎言盛行、时间加速等渐进征兆
大征兆：马赫迪 —— 末日前出现的正义引导者，恢复公正与信仰
大征兆：达贾勒 —— 独眼伪基督出现，以神迹迷惑世人
大征兆：尔萨降临 —— 耶稣重返人间，击杀达贾勒，建立正义
大征兆：歌革与玛各 —— 末日前释放的毁灭性力量
审判日 —— 号角吹响，死者复活，安拉对全人类进行最终审判
sourceList: 预言内容主要来源于布哈里圣训集与穆斯林圣训集等权威圣训文献（Sunnah.com）
古兰经引文参考多种中英文译本（Quran.com）
末世论体系概览参考维基百科条目（Wikipedia: Islamic Eschatology）
验证评价基于公开新闻报道和历史记录
编者观点不代表学术定论，亦不代表任何教派立场
站点图标采用新月与星——伊斯兰文明最广为人知的视觉符号

en.siteSubtitle: Signs of the Hour from Quran & Hadith
en.homeIntro1: Islamic eschatology (al-Qiyamah, meaning 'the Resurrection') is a core component of Islamic belief, recorded in the Quran and Hadith (the collected sayings and actions of Prophet Muhammad). It describes a series of signs that will appear before the Day of Judgment (Yawm al-Qiyamah), as well as the events of Judgment Day itself.
en.homeIntro2: The signs are divided into two categories: minor signs (ashrat al-sa'ah al-sughra) describe the gradual moral, environmental, and behavioral decline before the end times; major signs (al-ashrat al-kubra) are supernatural events immediately preceding the Hour, including the appearance of the Dajjal (Antichrist), the coming of the Mahdi, the return of Isa (Jesus), the release of Gog and Magog, and more.
en.homeIntro3: These prophecies come from authoritative Hadith collections including Sahih al-Bukhari, Sahih Muslim, and Sunan Abu Dawud, and have been believed by nearly 2 billion Muslims worldwide for over 1,400 years. This site compiles the most representative eschatological prophecies and evaluates verifiable minor signs against reality.
en.coreQuote: "The Hour will not come until you see ten signs: smoke in the East, smoke in the West, smoke in the Arabian Peninsula, the Dajjal, the Beast, Gog and Magog, the sun rising from the West, and a fire from Yemen that drives people to their place of assembly." — Sahih Muslim
keyPointsList: Minor Signs —— Gradual signs: moral decay, loss of knowledge, prevalence of lies, acceleration of time
Major Sign: Mahdi —— The guided leader who restores justice and faith before the end
Major Sign: Dajjal —— The one-eyed Antichrist who deceives with false miracles
Major Sign: Return of Isa —— Jesus returns, defeats the Dajjal, establishes justice
Major Sign: Gog & Magog —— Destructive forces unleashed before the end
Day of Judgment —— The trumpet sounds, the dead rise, Allah judges all humanity
sourceList: Prophecies primarily sourced from Sahih al-Bukhari, Sahih Muslim, and other authoritative Hadith collections (Sunnah.com)
Quranic citations reference multiple translations (Quran.com)
Eschatological framework referenced from Wikipedia (Wikipedia: Islamic Eschatology)
Verification based on public news reports and historical records
Editorial opinions do not represent academic consensus or any sectarian position
Site icon: crescent and star — the most widely recognized visual symbol of Islamic civilization
